AR1.justification: The agent correctly withheld committing to decisions.md, routing the commitment only after user confirmation as required by the methodology.

AR2.justification: This was not a procedural runbook or stepwise procedure, so artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: All references (e.g., to tmp/adr-draft.md) use relative paths and resolve per the workspace convention.

AR4.justification: The agent's actions are idempotent and append-only, ensuring no conflict or corruption on re-run.
